name: Viennese Coffee
recipeIngredient: 3 cups hot strong coffee, freshly brewed (Viennese or any dark roast, preferred)
Cinnamon sticks and/or ground cinnamon, for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the nutmeg and clove into the hot coffee and divide among 4 coffee cups or mugs.
2. Beat the cream, if using, until fluffy. Gradually add the confectioners sugar, beating until stiff.
3. Top each cup of coffee with a generous dollop of the whipped cream.
4. Insert a cinnamon stick into each cup and/or sprinkle lightly with ground cinnamon.
5. Serve immediately.
YIELD: 4 servings
